summary: The Amazon India homepage has several design issues related to visual hierarchy, contrast, spacing, alignment, and consistency.

findings.issue: The 'Mega Deal Days' banner is prominent but the 'Deals Trending Now Under ₹999' section header is equally large, causing visual competition.
findings.user_impact: Users may find it difficult to focus on primary actions.
findings.recommendation: Make the primary action (search) more prominent and distinguishable from secondary actions.

findings.issue: The background color of the top navigation bar has a low contrast with the text color.
findings.user_impact: Users may experience slight visual discomfort.
findings.recommendation: Increase the contrast between the background and text colors to meet WCAG AA standards.

findings.issue: The spacing between section headers and their content is inconsistent.
findings.user_impact: Users may find it slightly difficult to distinguish between sections.
findings.recommendation: Standardize the spacing between section headers and content.

findings.issue: Some section content is not perfectly aligned (e.g., images and text).
findings.user_impact: Users may notice slight visual dissonance.
findings.recommendation: Ensure consistent alignment of content within sections.

findings.issue: The 'Update location' button has a different style compared to other buttons on the page.
findings.user_impact: Users may find it slightly confusing.
findings.recommendation: Standardize button styles across the page.
